content: {"interpretation": "Patient P's estradiol is flat against the expected curve (380 vs ~1200 pg/mL by day 8, ratio 0.32) with low reserve (AMH 0.6, AFC 5) and only 4 mature follicles, meeting the poor-response criteria.", "recommended_action": "Escalate to the biologist for a dose and plan review: consider increasing gonadotropins by 75-150 IU or reconsidering the stimulation plan, per the poor-responder rule."}
